artPrompt: A widescreen film-still peering through the rain-streaked window of a dingy pawn shop after dark, a dusty accordion and tarnished trinkets crowding a sun-faded display untouched by time, a single amber bulb glowing deep within behind a beaded curtain that hides a back room; ink-black night and wet brick frame the storefront, secrets behind the glass, no figures, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Pawn Shop That's a Front
text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{T}, Sacrifice a Favor token: Add {B}{B}. The favor is fungible. Everything in here is fungible. None of it is for sale.
flavorText: The window display hasn't changed in eleven years. The accordion is not for sale. Nothing is.
